title: Renice Cubed
description: Fabric modpack focused on gameplay tweaks for a smoother, more enjoyable experience.
body:
This modpack provides amazing optimization, QoL improvements, and tech utilities for your redstone contraptions, farms, and builds. A mix of well tuned config, active support, and ready to use improvements right out of the box!

**[Modpack wiki](https://renice-cubed.gitbook.io/wiki) for more detailed info.**

## Main Features

### UI&HUD

This modpack lets you browse items and recipes on any world/server, even when the server itself does not have a recipe viewing mod installed, so crafting information remains available wherever you play. _This matters on modern mc versions because the client no longer receives the full server recipe list by default, which can leave client-side recipe viewers with unusable recipe pages unless the server also provides recipe data._

It also displays the durability of your armor, held items, weapons, and tools, adds block and entity tooltips, hunger and saturation values, effect timers, an expanded statistics screen, and configurable tech overlays for world data directly in game, including coordinates, light levels, biome info, facing direction, structure boxes, and other useful data without needing to open a separate menu like F3.

### Building and Utility Tools

The pack adds practical tools for building and client customization. It includes configurable zoom, accurate block placement, schematic previews for your builds, faster crafting controls, hotkey based brightness control, 2160p screenshot support even if you don't have a 4K screen, faster language switching, and cleaner access to settings and mod configs.

### Maps and Navigation

Exploration is easier with an on screen minimap, a full screen self updating world map, waypoint management, deathpoints, explored area tracking, cave and terrain display options, and map integration that helps keep marked locations visible while travelling.

### Chat and multiplayer QoL

The pack supports voice chat when the server is configured for it, shows player heads next to chat messages, keeps a much longer chat history, saves your typed chat messages between game sessions: usually, pressing the Up Arrow in chat brings back messages you typed earlier, but vanilla only keeps them within the current game session. More Chat History fixes this by keeping your chat inputs saved even after restarting the game.

### Performance and Responsiveness

The pack includes a set of optimization mods selected to improve rendering, memory usage, loading behavior, entity handling, and general client responsiveness.

Performance-related mods include:

*   Sodium
*   Lithium
*   FerriteCore
*   ImmediatelyFast
*   ModernFix
*   BadOptimizations
*   Entity Culling
*   More Culling
*   Dynamic FPS
*   Clumps
*   Better Block Entities
*   Debugify

These mods are included to help the game feel smoother on a wide range of hardware.

### Visuals and Resource Pack Support

The pack also improves the visual side of the game while keeping the pack client-side.

Included visual and compatibility features include:

*   Shader support through Iris
*   Extra video settings through Sodium Extra and Reese's Sodium Options
*   Connected textures through Continuity
*   Entity model and texture compatibility through Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features
*   Improved player skin rendering through 3D Skin Layers
*   Dynamic lighting through LambDynamicLights
*   Improved sound behavior through Sound Physics Remastered
